prompt: Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate XRAY CSV only. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-001; AC1 Given valid policy document status READY, Download is enabled.
expected_response: Should output raw CSV text with the exact header: Story ID,TC ID,Execution Type,Test Type,Summary,Description,Application List,Regression,Priority,Data,Automated,Assignee Name,Sprint,Action,Expected Result. Should not use markdown table formatting.

prompt: Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate a multi-step XRAY CSV test. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-002; AC1 Given user opens FNOL, enters valid loss details, and submits, then claim is created.
expected_response: Should use one row per test step. First row includes metadata; continuation rows leave metadata columns blank and populate only Action and Expected Result.

prompt: Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate XRAY CSV with missing assignee and sprint. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-003; AC1 Given payment service unavailable, checkout displays TEMPORARILY_UNAVAILABLE.
expected_response: Should preserve all required columns and put TBD or blanks according to template rules for missing Assignee Name and Sprint. Should not remove columns.

prompt: Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate XRAY CSV for account masking. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-004; AC1 Given accountNumber is valid, enrollment stores masked account ending in last four digits.
expected_response: Should use masked/fake account examples only and keep CSV fields consistently quoted or escaped when needed. Should not output full real account numbers.

prompt: Category 4 - XRAY CSV Compliance. Evaluation mode request: Generate XRAY CSV and CoverageMap. StoryID=SYNTH-C4-005; AC1 Given state AZ is selected, results show only AZ licensed producers.
expected_response: Should return XRAY CSV as raw CSV text with strict columns. CoverageMap should also be CSV with a header row and consistent columns.
